top_findings.title: Cross-file queries available but not explicitly integrated
top_findings.evidence: Tools query match data and player data separately; no single tool combines player+match filters
top_findings.suggestion: Could add explicit cross-file queries like 'find_players_at_team_in_season' for seamless integration

top_findings.title: All 6 CSV datasets loadable and queryable
top_findings.evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:197-217 load-all! loads all 6 files; data_test.clj:62-78 verifies all datasets

top_findings.title: Match queries across all competitions
top_findings.evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/server.clj:14-46 tool definitions; tools.clj:42-122 match query implementations

top_findings.title: Player search by name, nationality, club
Team statistics and head-to-head comparison
top_findings.evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/tools.clj:128-193 team queries; tools_test.clj:63-80 tests verify calculations
